title: Wordle
description: Daily five-letter puzzle with Nord styling, keyboard flair, and local streak scoring.

title: Brick Breaker
description: Smash colorful googly-eyed bricks with a bouncing ball in this toy-block arcade game.

title: Tic Tac Toe
description: Classic 3x3 play with a portrait-first layout built for the browser.

title: Flappy
description: Tap or click to flap, hold altitude, and reset instantly for another run.

title: pai-do
description: Prototype board sandbox with a portrait-first playfield and a slide-up tile drawer.
